sql: SELECT l1.customer_id, l1.end_date FROM loans AS l1
SELECT l1.id, l1.principal_amount FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.id < 343 LIMIT 54
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.name LIKE 'b%'
SELECT c1.issued_on, c1.card_type, c1.account_id FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.card_type = 'admin'
SELECT * FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id <> 994
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.city = 'test'
SELECT c1.credit_score, c1.email, c1.last_name FROM customers AS c1
SELECT c1.created_at, c1.phone FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.credit_score >= 881
SELECT c1.email, c1.is_active FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.is_active = 0
SELECT * FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.id < 270 LIMIT 55
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 ORDER BY e1.salary
SELECT c1.expiry_date, c1.id FROM cards AS c1 ORDER BY c1.issued_on
SELECT c1.expiry_date FROM cards AS c1 ORDER BY c1.is_active LIMIT 61
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.start_date < DATETIME('now', '-4 days') ORDER BY l1.interest_rate LIMIT 12
SELECT b1.manager_id, b1.city FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.id <> 622
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.city = 'user' ORDER BY b1.city LIMIT 71
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1
SELECT b1.manager_id, b1.id, b1.city, b1.name FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.name = 'user' LIMIT 99
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 ORDER BY e1.last_name LIMIT 64
SELECT e1.branch_id FROM employees AS e1
SELECT c1.account_id, c1.credit_limit, c1.card_number, c1.expiry_date FROM cards AS c1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a6 ON c1.account_id = a6.id
SELECT e2.id, e2.branch_id, e2.hire_date, b1.state FROM branches AS b1 LEFT JOIN employees AS e2 ON b1.id = e2.branch_id
SELECT t1.transaction_date, a5.id, a5.interest_rate FROM transactions AS t1 RIGHT JOIN accounts AS a5 ON t1.to_account_id = a5.id
SELECT b1.city, b1.name, b1.employee_count, e8.branch_id FROM branches AS b1 LEFT JOIN employees AS e8 ON b1.id = e8.branch_id
SELECT l6.is_active, c1.email, l6.end_date, l6.monthly_payment FROM customers AS c1 INNER JOIN loans AS l6 ON c1.id = l6.customer_id
SELECT l6.principal_amount, c1.phone, c1.credit_score, l6.loan_type FROM customers AS c1 INNER JOIN loans AS l6 ON c1.id = l6.customer_id
SELECT a2.opened_on, a2.id, t1.to_account_id, a2.interest_rate FROM transactions AS t1 RIGHT JOIN accounts AS a2 ON t1.to_account_id = a2.id WHERE a2.is_active = 1
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 FULL JOIN branches AS b1 ON e1.branch_id = b1.id WHERE b1.city LIKE '%c'
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1 FULL JOIN branches AS b1 ON e1.branch_id = b1.id WHERE b1.employee_count <= 545
SELECT e1.first_name, b8.state, b8.city FROM employees AS e1 FULL JOIN branches AS b8 ON e1.branch_id = b8.id WHERE b8.manager_id = 151
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 LEFT JOIN customers AS c6 ON l1.customer_id = c6.id
SELECT c1.account_id, a4.currency, c1.expiry_date, a4.opened_on FROM cards AS c1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a4 ON c1.account_id = a4.id WHERE a4.opened_on <= DATETIME('now', '-8 days')
SELECT b1.name, b1.manager_id, e1.first_name, e1.salary FROM branches AS b1 FULL JOIN employees AS e1 ON b1.id = e1.branch_id WHERE e1.is_active = 0
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 RIGHT JOIN loans AS l5 ON c1.id = l5.customer_id WHERE l5.id < 295
SELECT a7.is_active, a7.currency, c1.card_type, c1.id FROM cards AS c1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a7 ON c1.account_id = a7.id
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 INNER JOIN cards AS c6 ON a1.id = c6.account_id
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 LEFT JOIN loans AS l3 ON c1.id = l3.customer_id WHERE l3.is_active = 1
SELECT b7.city, b7.manager_id, e1.id, e1.branch_id FROM employees AS e1 FULL JOIN branches AS b7 ON e1.branch_id = b7.id WHERE b7.manager_id = 277
SELECT a1.interest_rate, a1.balance, c1.card_type, a1.customer_id FROM cards AS c1 RIGHT JOIN accounts AS a1 ON c1.account_id = a1.id
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 INNER JOIN customers AS c5 ON l1.customer_id = c5.id WHERE c5.email <> 'user74@example.com'
SELECT e1.first_name, e1.last_name, e1.branch_id FROM employees AS e1 JOIN employees AS e2 ON e1.branch_id = e2.branch_id AND e1.id <> e2.id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM cards AS inner_cards WHERE inner_cards.is_active = 0) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM transactions AS inner_transactions WHERE inner_transactions.status <> 'user') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.transaction_date > DATETIME('now', '-29 days')
SELECT t1.id, t1.status, t1.from_account_id, t1.amount FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.balance <= 750)
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.id IN (SELECT sub_c.account_id FROM cards AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.issued_on >= DATETIME('now', '-1 days'))
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.id IN (SELECT sub_e.branch_id FROM employees AS sub_e WHERE sub_e.salary <> 484)
SELECT t1.to_account_id, t1.from_account_id, t1.description FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.id = t1.to_account_id AND sub_a.currency <> 'admin')
SELECT b1.id, b1.name, b1.city FROM branches AS b1 JOIN branches AS b2 ON b1.name = b2.name AND b1.id <> b2.id LIMIT 14
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM cards AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.account_id = a1.id AND sub_c.credit_limit <= 429)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM branches AS inner_branches WHERE inner_branches.manager_id = 426) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.customer_id IN (SELECT sub_c.id FROM customers AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.date_of_birth <= DATETIME('now', '-21 days'))
SELECT t1.status, t1.to_account_id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.currency = 'test')
SELECT l1.term_months FROM loans AS l1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM customers AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.id = l1.customer_id AND sub_c.address <> 'admin')
SELECT t1.transaction_date, t1.description, t1.id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.is_active = 1)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM accounts AS inner_accounts WHERE inner_accounts.currency = 'activity') AS derived_table
SELECT c1.first_name, c1.last_name, c1.email FROM customers AS c1 JOIN customers AS c2 ON c1.id = c2.id AND c1.id <> c2.id
SELECT c1.first_name, c1.last_name, c1.email FROM customers AS c1 JOIN customers AS c2 ON c1.id = c2.id AND c1.id <> c2.id
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.customer_id IN (SELECT sub_c.id FROM customers AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.is_active = 0)
SELECT c1.credit_limit, c1.id FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.customer_id = 909)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM accounts AS inner_accounts WHERE inner_accounts.balance <> 495) AS derived_table

SELECT t1.transaction_date, t1.from_account_id, t1.to_account_id, t1.id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.transaction_type <> 'test' UNION ALL SELECT t2.transaction_date, t2.from_account_id, t2.to_account_id, t2.id FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.transaction_type LIKE 'b%'

SELECT a1.currency, a1.customer_id, a1.opened_on FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.currency LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT a2.currency, a2.customer_id, a2.opened_on FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.is_active = 0 LIMIT 20

SELECT a1.customer_id, a1.interest_rate, a1.id, a1.opened_on FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.opened_on >= DATETIME('now', '-25 days') UNION ALL SELECT a2.customer_id, a2.interest_rate, a2.id, a2.opened_on FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.balance <> 481 LIMIT 21

SELECT a1.opened_on, a1.id, a1.account_type, a1.currency FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.currency <> '123' UNION SELECT a2.opened_on, a2.id, a2.account_type, a2.currency FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.opened_on <= DATETIME('now', '-2 days') ORDER BY opened_on LIMIT 35

SELECT b1.is_active, b1.state, b1.id, b1.employee_count FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.manager_id = 145 UNION ALL SELECT b2.is_active, b2.state, b2.id, b2.employee_count FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.city LIKE '%c' LIMIT 23

SELECT t1.from_account_id, t1.description FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.transaction_type = 'activity' UNION ALL SELECT t2.from_account_id, t2.description FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.amount = 9
SELECT l1.principal_amount, l1.start_date FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.is_active = 0 UNION SELECT l2.principal_amount, l2.start_date FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.interest_rate > 803 LIMIT 26
SELECT e1.first_name, e1.last_name FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.salary >= 4 UNION ALL SELECT e2.first_name, e2.last_name FROM employees AS e2 WHERE e2.id <> 198 ORDER BY first_name
SELECT a1.account_type, a1.balance FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.account_type = '123' UNION SELECT a2.account_type, a2.balance FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.interest_rate > 622 LIMIT 36
SELECT c1.id, c1.card_type FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.credit_limit >= 898 UNION ALL SELECT c2.id, c2.card_type FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.card_number LIKE '%c'
SELECT l1.id, l1.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.principal_amount < 486 UNION ALL SELECT l2.id, l2.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.principal_amount <> 13

SELECT l1.customer_id, l1.end_date, l1.term_months, l1.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.term_months > 146 UNION ALL SELECT l2.customer_id, l2.end_date, l2.term_months, l2.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.interest_rate >= 75 ORDER BY customer_id

SELECT t1.id, t1.status, t1.from_account_id, t1.to_account_id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.transaction_date > DATETIME('now', '-11 days') UNION SELECT t2.id, t2.status, t2.from_account_id, t2.to_account_id FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.id = 13 ORDER BY id
SELECT e1.first_name, e1.last_name FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.position LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT e2.first_name, e2.last_name FROM employees AS e2 WHERE e2.is_active = 0 LIMIT 23

SELECT l1.id, l1.start_date, l1.end_date, l1.principal_amount FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.start_date < DATETIME('now', '-2 days') UNION SELECT l2.id, l2.start_date, l2.end_date, l2.principal_amount FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.is_active = 0

SELECT a1.currency, a1.is_active FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.opened_on >= DATETIME('now', '-28 days') UNION ALL SELECT a2.currency, a2.is_active FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.customer_id >= 67 ORDER BY currency LIMIT 42

SELECT c1.card_type, c1.expiry_date, c1.is_active FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.expiry_date <= DATETIME('now', '-5 days') UNION ALL SELECT c2.card_type, c2.expiry_date, c2.is_active FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.card_number LIKE 'b%'

SELECT e1.is_active, e1.first_name FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.hire_date >= DATETIME('now', '-20 days') UNION ALL SELECT e2.is_active, e2.first_name FROM employees AS e2 WHERE e2.salary = 832 ORDER BY is_active

SELECT l1.interest_rate, l1.end_date, l1.customer_id, l1.loan_type FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.principal_amount = 552 UNION SELECT l2.interest_rate, l2.end_date, l2.customer_id, l2.loan_type FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.principal_amount < 47 ORDER BY interest_rate LIMIT 49
SELECT l1.id, l1.loan_type, l1.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.id > 709 UNION ALL SELECT l2.id, l2.loan_type, l2.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.principal_amount >= 137

UPDATE loans SET term_months = 625 WHERE loans.principal_amount >= 599
UPDATE loans SET customer_id = 659 WHERE loans.interest_rate < 700

UPDATE customers SET address = 'Updated text 89' WHERE customers.id = 998

UPDATE branches SET name = 'Updated text 37' WHERE branches.state <> 'admin'
